name: rpwner-proxy
description: rpwner - Fast & Secure Web Proxy with Scramjet

scripts.build: mkdir -p scram baremux/transport && cp node_modules/@mercuryworkshop/scramjet/dist/* scram/ && cp node_modules/@mercuryworkshop/bare-mux/dist/baremux.bundle.js baremux/ && cp node_modules/@mercuryworkshop/bare-mux/dist/transport/fetch.js baremux/transport/

author: rpwner
